PotBellyStove.description: A wrought iron stove for cooking basic meals.
PotBellyStove.flavorText: Hearty and filling, the warm meals provided by this stove are the next steps towards culinary perfection.

Platinum_Ore.description: As rare on Icarus as on Earth.
Platinum_Ore.flavorText: One of the least reactive metals in the universe, platinum requires extremely high temperatures for smelting and refinement.

Platinum_Ingot.description: An inert and corrosion-resistant metal, perfect for electronics.
Platinum_Ingot.flavorText: Enough platinum to found a small kingdom, were you on Earth.

PolarBear_Trophy.flavorText: Greater challenges await beyond the terrazone, but here, there is no greater emblem of your eminence.

PolarBear_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Polar Bear.
PolarBear_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Paste_Health_Regen.description: A herbal confection that speeds healing.
Paste_Health_Regen.flavorText: The lily\'s high concentration of bioactive ingredients is thought to inhibit the reuptake of certain cytochromes, briefly flooding your body with oxidating enzymes.

Paste_Health_Buff.description: An organic preparation that temporarily increases health.
Paste_Health_Buff.flavorText: Like so many things on Icarus, the exact ingredients would probably render this concoction illegal on Earth.

Paste_Health_Restore.description: An organic fusion that restores health.
Paste_Health_Restore.flavorText: The combination of Icarus\'s unique conditions and genetic adjustments to plant life has seen the addition of \'useful\' methyl chains to many previously innocuous plant-based preparations.

Paste_Stamina_Regen.description: An organic stimulant that accelerates stamina recovery.
Paste_Stamina_Regen.flavorText: A herbal preparation that acts rapidly on the sympathetic nervous system, increasing noradrenergic activity.

Paste_Stamina_Buff.description: A herbal concoction, temporarily increasing stamina.
Paste_Stamina_Buff.flavorText: While lacking some of the pharmaceutical refinements, this paste produces similar physiological affects to the \'wakers\' once offered to long haul space pilots.

Paste_Stamina_Restore.description: A natural stimulant that restores lost stamina.
Paste_Stamina_Restore.flavorText: As countless athletes, party-goers and would-be mystics have noted, the line between natural stimulant and highly addictive narcotic is arbitrary, at best.

Paste_Stamina_Consumption.description: A biotic compound that slows stamina loss temporarily.
Paste_Stamina_Consumption.flavorText: The time-jarring effects of exotics find their influence in many subtle, poorly understood ways on Icarus.

Paste_Oxygen_Buff.description: A natural concoction that increases available oxygen.
Paste_Oxygen_Buff.flavorText: Your parents are a long way from here. What you do with your body is your business.

Paste_Oxygen_Consumption.flavorText: This preparation reduces the heart rate, dropping oxygen consumption temporarily.

Paste_Oxygen_Restore.description: An organic co-factor that rapidly restores oxygen.

Paste_Food_Consumption.description: An organic confection that arrests hunger for a limited time.
Paste_Food_Consumption.flavorText: Just because it\'s organic, doesn\'t mean it\'s good for you.

Paste_Water_Consumption.description: A natural preparation, temporarily reducing the body\'s need for water.

Poison_Arrow.flavorText: Requiring less accuracy, but more patience, the poison arrow brings down quarry slowly, but surely.

Poison_Paste.description: A slow-working toxin made from spoiled meat.
Poison_Paste.flavorText: \'Life is a slow working poison\' - Jean Hurvit

Portable_Beacon.description: Displays a map marker when deployed. Prospectors can adjust the map markers icon and colour by interacting with it.
Portable_Beacon.flavorText: Absorbs the smallest amount of light from any atmosphere and stores it in a small internal battery that can last for hundreds of years with minimal charge. The beacon offers a BYO solution.

Polarbear_Pelt.description: A fur hide from the largest known carnivore on two planets.
Polarbear_Pelt.flavorText: An unparalleled hunter, able to smell its prey from over a mile away, the polar bear has only one natural enemy: you.

Polarbear_Head_Armor.flavorText: Once a warm high altitude desert, the arctic\'s temperature dropped in the aftermath of failed terraforming, leaving a frigid wasteland of which the polar bear is now the unchallenged apex predator.

Polarbear_Chest_Armor.description: Strong, lightweight body armor with extreme protection against cold.
Polarbear_Chest_Armor.flavorText: Evolved for the most demanding climate on Earth, the polar bear\'s skin works equally well in the most damaged environment on Icarus.

Polarbear_Feet_Armor.description: Highly insulated, lightweight protective fur boots.
Polarbear_Feet_Armor.flavorText: Evolved for the most demanding climate on Earth, the polar bear\'s skin works equally well in the most damaged environment on Icarus.

Polarbear_Leg_Armor.description: Lightweight fur armor for the lower body, offering exceptional insulation.
Polarbear_Leg_Armor.flavorText: Once a warm high altitude desert, the arctic\'s temperature dropped in the aftermath of failed terraforming, leaving a frigid wasteland of which the polar bear is now the unchallenged apex predator.

Polarbear_Arm_Armor.description: Tough and lightweight fur gloves offering extreme protection against low temperatures.
Polarbear_Arm_Armor.flavorText: Skinning polar bears has been illegal to everyone except Inuit hunters for centuries on Earth. On Icarus, there is no such prohibition.

Platinum_Bolt.flavorText: Though eclipsed by exotics, platinum remains extremely valuable, even if the market is somewhat distant.

Platinum_Spear.description: Priceless on Earth. An advanced survival tool on Icarus.
Platinum_Spear.flavorText: A midweight, short-shafted ahlspeiss spear that, composition aside, would not have looked out of place in 16th century Prussia.

Platinum_Knife.description: A precision blade, stronger than steel.
Platinum_Knife.flavorText: Platinum\'s durablity gives an incredibly accurate, lethal cutting edge.

Platinum_Axe.description: An axceedingly reliable, accurate hewing tool.
Platinum_Axe.flavorText: "Give me six hours to chop down a tree, I\'ll spend the first four sharpening the axe" - A. Lincoln

Platinum_Sickle.description: An extremely precise, high yield harvesting tool.
Platinum_Sickle.flavorText: A proletariat icon made from a near-priceless material, yet no more valuable than lead when compared to exotics themselves.

Platinum_Hammer.description: Light, durable, accurate, but still a hammer.
Platinum_Hammer.flavorText: "On Icarus, you\'re either the hammer, or the anvil" - Javier Survez

Platinum_Pickaxe.flavorText: There is a small, but specific class of problems for which the only solution is a pickaxe.

Pumpkin.flavorText: Ensuring that Halloween becomes a multi-planet holiday. Best cooked.

Pastry.description: A simple but satisfying shortcrust pastry.
Pastry.flavorText: \'Icarus was only truly colonized when we began making pastry on that planet\' - Jacques Merrida

Pumpkin_Bread.description: A noticeably yellow loaf that significantly increases endurance.

Pickled_Carrot.flavorText: Like many other ancient ways, pickling has found a place on Icarus.

Poisoned_Bait.flavorText: Keep away from pets and children.

Pumpkin_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Poison_Sack.description: A slightly squishy organ harvested from native creatures

Prototype_Boss_Tracker.description: Certain large threats will be displayed on your map with this item if nearby.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Gold from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Gold from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Gold_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Copper from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Copper from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Copper_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Platinum from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Platinum from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Platnium_Yield_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_1.description: An attachment that increases the yield of Titanium from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_1.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_2.description: An attachment that greatly increases the yield of Titanium from ore nodes.
Pickaxe_Attachment_Titanium_2.flavorText: Can be equipped to a valid pickaxe at an Alteration Bench.

Platinum_Weave.description: Platinum strands interwoven with a fiber based fabric.

Potato.description: A starchy tuber that makes up the base of many meals.
Potato.flavorText: Mash them, boil them, you can even put them in a stew.

Platinum_Throwing_Knife.description: A precision blade, stronger than steel.
Platinum_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: Platinum\'s durablity gives an incredibly accurate, lethal cutting edge.

Platinum_Throwing_Spear.description: Priceless on Earth. A projectile on Icarus.
Platinum_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: A midweight, short-shafted ahlspeiss spear that, composition aside, would not have looked out of place in 16th century Prussia.

Platinum_Crossbow.description: A crossbow that automatically reloads for rapid fire.
Platinum_Crossbow.flavorText: It\'s time for some serious damage.

ProspectorID.description: The Standard ID of a Prospector Issued by the UDA

Pickled_Tomato.description: Increases stamina, health regeneration, and shared XP.

Potato_Carrot_Fries.description: Delivers a wide range of health benefits.

Potato_Bread.description: Improves stamina and keeps you fuller for longer.

Poison_Sack_Lure.description: A basic lure carefully crafted from an intact poison sac.
Poison_Sack_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Pickled_Avocado.description: Avocado that has been marinated resulting in a tangy and slightly sour flavor.
Pickled_Avocado.flavorText: A handy snack made at your Kitchen Bench.

Piranha_Statue_Wood.description: One of the fish of Icarus carved out of wood.

Pickled_Freshwater_Fillet.description: A tangy dish made by preserving tender fillets of freshwater fish in a flavorful mixture.
Pickled_Freshwater_Fillet.flavorText: Not for everyone, but a delicious long lasting treat for those that enjoy it.

Painting_Wood.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a wooden frame.
Painting_Wood.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Dark.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a charcoal frame.
Painting_Dark.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Metal.description: A portrait painting on canvas with an iron frame.
Painting_Metal.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Gold.description: A large painting on canvas with a golden frame.
Painting_Gold.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Gold_Wood.description: A portrait painting on canvas with a gold leaf frame.
Painting_Gold_Wood.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Painting_Scroll.description: A portrait painting on canvas held in a scroll.
Painting_Scroll.flavorText: Most artwork increases in value when the artist dies... the Icarus art trade must be booming.

Paints.description: Paints lovingly crafted for Portrait Painting

Platinum_Sheath.description: A small sheath of platinum which can be used in a variety of electronics and machinery.

Pyritic_Crust_Iron.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Iron Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Iron.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Gold.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Gold Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Gold.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Copper.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Copper Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Copper.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Silicon.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Silica. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Silicon.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Coal.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Coal. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Coal.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Sulfur.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Sulfur. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Sulfur.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Bauxite.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Aluminium Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Bauxite.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Oxite.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Oxite. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Oxite.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Titanium.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Titanium Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Titanium.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Platinium.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Platinum Ore. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Platinium.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Obsidian.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Obsidian. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Obsidian.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Scoria.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Scoria. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Scoria.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Clay.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Clay. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Clay.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Purple_Exotic.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Exotics. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Purple_Exotic.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Red_Exotic.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Volatile Raw Exotics. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Red_Exotic.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pumpkin_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Potato_Seed.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Potato_Seed_Pack.description: Can be planted in a Dirt Mound or Crop Plot.

Platinum_Ore_Stack_100.description: As rare on Icarus as on Earth.
Platinum_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: One of the least reactive metals in the universe, platinum requires extremely high temperatures for smelting and refinement.

Pronghorn_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Pronghorn.
Pronghorn_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Pygmy_Lopp_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Pronghorn_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Platinum_Shovel.description: Can be used to dig dirt mounds on dirt or grass, or shovel snow off your roof. Provides slight storm resistance to your crops.
Platinum_Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Pistol_CHAC.description: A modern pistol made in the classic 3D printed CHAC style.
Pistol_CHAC.flavorText: The latest addition from the China Hangzhou Armament Company

Pyritic_Crust_Stone.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Stone. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Stone.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Salt.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Salt. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Salt.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Pyritic_Crust_Limestone.description: A heavily scarred stone with traces of metal and minerals. Use the Organic Residue Cleanser to gain Limestone. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Pyritic_Crust_Limestone.flavorText: The UDA has issued an Icarus-wide health warning regarding this material. Use at your own risk.

Purification_Pill.description: Will remove the risk of Dysentery from Tainted / Rain water. Removes any flavour effects.\r\n\r\nTo use, Craft the \'Cool Water\' recipe on your character with this tablet and a non-pure water source in your inventory.

Pickled_Eggs.description: Boiled Eggs preseved in a pickling solution, to be consumed at a later date.

Packed_Fuel_Brick.description: Compressed Fur mixed with Tree Sap to create a longer lasting fuel.

Pistol_T3.description: A weapon with decent bang for your buck.

Pistol_T4.description: A pistol that utilizes the best planetside tech available.

Portable_Generator.description: An efficient, if basic biofuel-driven electric generator.
Portable_Generator.flavorText: For the prospector on the go.

Portable_Tank_Water.description: Useful for hauling water long distances. Can be connected to water networks.

Portable_Tank_Biofuel.description: Useful for hauling biofuel long distances.
Portable_Tank_Biofuel.flavorText: Carrying a large container full of explosive liquid, what could go wrong?

Plough_Steel.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create quality mounds when seeding.

Plough_Platinum.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create medium quality mounds when seeding.

Plough_Titanium.description: An attachment for the seeding cart to create high quality mounds when seeding.

Pavlova.description: A light, fluffy and tasty dessert.

Prop_Industrial_Sign_Square.description: A sign used in industrial sites and lab for conveying information.
Prop_Industrial_Sign_Square.flavorText: At least the UDA has SOME safety regulations.

Prop_Industrial_Sign_Triangle.description: A sign used in industrial sites and lab for conveying information.
Prop_Industrial_Sign_Triangle.flavorText: At least the UDA has SOME safety regulations.

Prop_Industrial_Sign_Diamond.description: A sign used in industrial sites and lab for conveying information.
Prop_Industrial_Sign_Diamond.flavorText: At least the UDA has SOME safety regulations.

Prop_Poster_Fishing.description: Displays some of the Fish of Icarus

Prop_Corkboard_Small.description: Contains notes and detailed diagrams of various things.

Prop_Corkboard_Large.description: Contains notes and detailed diagrams of various things.

Prop_Burlap_Sack.description: A Simple Burlap Sack. Anything could be inside.

Prop_Saddle_Bag.description: A small saddle bag that can store small objects.

Prop_Container.description: A basic container for storing fluids.

Prop_BearTrap.description: A Rusted Iron Bear Trap - no longer functional.
Prop_BearTrap.flavorText: This would have done some damage back in its day.

Prop_Sled.description: An old Sled, it could almost be functional if it wasn\'t so worn out.
Prop_Sled.flavorText: A few of these and you could get a race going.

Prop_Boardgame.description: Something to pass the time on Icarus.
Prop_Boardgame.flavorText: Immerse yourself in a game for a few hours and forget about everything trying to kill you outside.

Prop_Cards.description: Something to pass the time on Icarus.

Prop_Book.description: Something to pass the time on Icarus.

Prop_Bookstack.flavorText: Immerse yourself in a game for a few hours and forget about everything trying to kill you outside.

Prop_Magazine.description: Something to pass the time on Icarus.
Prop_Magazine.flavorText: Full of quizes and self help tips.

Prop_Propaganda_Sign.description: A helpful sign - brought to you by the UDA.

Prop_Surgical_Equipment.description: A set of sterilized surgical equipment used for operations or experimentation.

Prop_Cryogenic_Sample_Storage.description: Research canisters super cooled and filled with research samples.

Prop_Clipboard.description: Contains notes on Experiments and Observations.

Prop_Centrifuge.description: A device that spins samples at high speeds to separate substances based on their density

Prop_Flask.description: Can store all manner of chemicals for experiments.
Prop_Flask.flavorText: Or if you need to break bad...

Prop_Lab_Stand.description: A Stand for Holding flasks for titrations and other experiments.

Prop_Stirrer.description: A device used to thoroughly mix compounds via stirring.

Prop_Microscope.description: A device that can be used to examine small samples.

Prop_Moisture_Analyzer.description: A machine used to determine the moisture levels in samples.

Prop_Mortar_And_Pestle.description: A mortar and pestle used for grinding up elements.

Prop_Scales.description: A deviced that can be used to measure weight.

Prop_Test_Tube_Rack.description: A handy device for holding and storing test tubes.

Prop_Surgical_Masks.description: A box of surgical masks that can be used to filter contaminates in and out of your mouth.

Prop_Pipe1.description: Pipes that carry all sorts of wires and electrical elements.

Prop_Pipe2.description: Pipes that carry all sorts of wires and electrical elements.

Prop_CleaningSupplies.description: Industrial Strength Cleaning Supplies which can clean almost anything.

Prop_Eye_Wash_Station.description: A quick station for when experiments go wrong.

Prop_Labcoats.flavorText: White Coats make anyone look professional.

Prop_Skeleton.description: A fully anatomically correct skeleton stand.

Prop_Soap.description: A device which releases soap from the base when pushed.
Prop_Soap.flavorText: A good prospector always washes their hands.

Prop_Science_Tray.description: A tray containing different bits of equipment used in science experiments.

Prop_Medical_Trolly.description: Perfect for Storage of Medical Instruments.
Prop_Medical_Trolly.flavorText: Who builds a trolley with locked wheels?

Prop_Mining_Rail.description: A rail that was used to move mining carts.
Prop_Mining_Rail.flavorText: Looks like it\'s barely holding together.

Prop_Mining_Cart.description: An old mining cart which was used to transport ore.

Prop_Mining_Equipment.description: Strong equipment for use in large scale mining.

Pouch_Generic.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Red.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Red.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Green.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Green.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Pouch_Generic_Blue.description: A convenient 6 slot pouch for general use.
Pouch_Generic_Blue.flavorText: Right click to access the Pouch Inventory

Piglet_Head.description: A preserved memory of a little pig.
Piglet_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Piglet_Trophy.description: The mounted remains for a creature preserved forever.
Piglet_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Pig_Head.description: A preserved memory of a snouted friend.
Pig_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Pig_Trophy.description: The mounted remains for a creature preserved forever.
Pig_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Prebuilt_Spawn_Location.description: Spawn marker for NPCs created alongside prebuilt structures

Prop_Dropship.flavorText: How does this thing stay intact?
